meaning: n.冒险,投机,风险v.冒险,冒昧,斗胆,胆敢(谦语)
examples: Grace was flushed with the success of the venture.
People are afraid to venture out for fear of sniper attacks.
I was still uncommitted to the venture when we reached Kanpur.
Venture folks have seen a market across the board turn sour on them before.
Despite the success of this first substantial venture into literary criticism, or what F.
